root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_010_022000.withdraw_doc_no, vr_nsk_010_022000.withdraw_date, vr_nsk_010_022000.withdraw_status , vr_nsk_010_022000.entry_id, vr_nsk_010_022000.share_withdraw , vr_nsk_010_022000.membership_no, vr_nsk_010_022000.memname, vr_nsk_010_022000.member_group_no, vr_nsk_010_022000.member_group_name, vr_nsk_010_022000.mem_type_code, vr_nsk_010_022000.mem_type_desc FROM vr_nsk_010_022000 where 1=1 and vr_nsk_010_022000.withdraw_date between '!withdraw_date_1!' and '!withdraw_date_2!' /*WHERE*/
